title: stelis anchorilabia
intro: Stelis anchorilabia, also known as the Stelis orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America, where it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis anchorilabia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Stelis anchorilabia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
